name: Narrow Medium Decorative Plastic Bin White - Brightroom™: Modern Storage, Cut-Out Handles, 13" Cube Compatible
description:
Tidy up your indoor space in sleek style with the Narrow Medium Decorative Plastic Bin from Brightroom™. This white storage bin showcases a perforated design for a stylish look that blends effortlessly with any decor style. The multipurpose narrow storage bin is easy to stack and built-in handles make it easy to carry between rooms. You can place it on a shelf or desktop to keep items nicely organized.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
